actions.name: create_activity
actions.description: Create a manually entered Strava activity.

elapsedTime.description: Total time spent on the activity, in seconds.

trainer.description: Whether to mark it as a trainer activity.

commute.description: Whether to mark it as commuting.

actions.name: explore_segments
actions.description: Explore eligible Strava segments within a given bounding box.

bounds.description: Bounding box coordinates: south latitude, west longitude, north latitude, east longitude.

actions.name: export_route_gpx
actions.description: Export the GPX content of a specified Strava route.

actions.name: export_route_tcx
actions.description: Export TCX content for a specified Strava route.

actions.name: get_activity
actions.description: Get activity details for current Strava athlete by ID.

includeAllEfforts.description: Whether to return all segment efforts.

actions.name: get_activity_streams
actions.description: Get stream data for the specified Strava activity.

keyByType.description: Whether Strava should key streams by stream type.

actions.name: get_activity_zones
actions.description: Get the training zones for the specified Strava activity.

actions.name: get_athlete_stats
actions.description: Get a summary of statistics for a specified Strava athlete.

actions.name: get_authenticated_athlete
actions.description: Get currently authenticated Strava athlete profile.

actions.name: get_club
actions.description: Get Strava club details by ID.

actions.name: get_equipment
actions.description: Get Strava gear details by ID.

actions.name: get_route
actions.description: Get Strava route details by ID.

actions.name: get_route_streams
actions.description: Get stream data for a specified Strava route.

actions.name: get_segment
actions.description: Get Strava segment details by ID.

actions.name: get_segment_effort
actions.description: Get Strava segment effort details by ID.

actions.name: get_segment_effort_streams
actions.description: Get stream data for a specified Strava segment effort.

keyByType.description: Whether Strava should key streams by stream type.

actions.name: get_segment_streams
actions.description: Get stream data for a specified Strava segment.

keyByType.description: Whether Strava should key streams by stream type.

actions.name: get_upload
actions.description: Query the status of Strava activity upload tasks.

actions.name: get_zones
actions.description: Get the current Strava athlete's training zones.

actions.name: list_activity_comments
actions.description: List comments for the specified Strava activity.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

pageSize.description: Recommended number of records per page.

afterCursor.description: Cursor for the last record on the previous page.

actions.name: list_activity_kudoers
actions.description: List athletes who have liked the specified Strava activity.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_activity_laps
actions.description: List laps for a given Strava activity.

actions.name: list_athlete_activities
actions.description: Paginated list of current Strava athlete activities.

before.description: Unix timestamp before which activities are returned.

after.description: Unix timestamp after which activities are returned.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_athlete_clubs
actions.description: List the clubs current Strava athlete belongs to.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_athlete_routes
actions.description: Paginated list of routes for a given Strava athlete.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_club_activities
actions.description: Paginated list of recent activity for a given Strava club.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_club_administrators
actions.description: Paginated list of Strava club admins.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_club_members
actions.description: Paginated list of Strava club members.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_segment_efforts
actions.description: List Strava segment efforts by segment ID.

startDateLocal.description: Lower bound on local start time.

endDateLocal.description: Upper bound on local start time.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: list_starred_segments
actions.description: Paginated list of current Strava athlete starred segments.

perPage.description: The number of records returned per page.

actions.name: star_segment
actions.description: Favorite or unfavorite a specific Strava segment.

actions.name: update_activity
actions.description: Update activity information for current Strava athlete.

actions.name: update_athlete
actions.description: Update current Strava athlete's weight.

actions.name: upload_activity
actions.description: Upload GPX, TCX or FIT files to Strava to generate activities.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

file.description: The GPX, TCX or FIT file uploaded through the local transit file API.

trainer.description: Whether to mark it as a trainer activity.

commute.description: Whether to mark it as commuting.
